name: Distraction Driver
author: Poki
description: Distraction Driver is a driving game where staying focused is your biggest challenge! Dodge all sorts of random and ridiculous obstacles trying to slow you down as you race toward victory. Collect coins along the way to unlock awesome new cars and skins. Can you keep your eyes on the road and win every race without losing focus? How to play Distraction Driver? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Brake: S or the down arrow key Turn: A/D or left and right arrow keys Who created Distraction Driver? Distraction Driver is created by Dinobros. Play their other games on Poki: My Kitten Home , My Super Tiny Market , goal-training and Sticker Album ! How can I play Distraction Driver for free? You can play Distraction Driver for free on Poki. Can I play Distraction Driver on mobile devices and desktop? Distraction Driver can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
